content:
<[[TKC1VG2I]]># [[NAME]]

Email: [[EMAIL]]

## Summary
Team Lead Digital Analytics with strong experience in building and scaling analytics teams, managing enterprise-level tracking infrastructures, and delivering data-driven insights using the Google Stack.

## Professional Experience

### Lead Digital Analytics | Company A
Jan 2022 – Present

- Led digital analytics function and owned end-to-end tracking and reporting setup
- Managed a team of 4 digital analysts
- Worked extensively with Google Stack: GA4, GTM, BigQuery, Looker Studio, Google Cloud
- Built reporting frameworks for marketing and product performance
- Coordinated analytics delivery across multiple business units
### Senior Digital Analyst | Company B
Jun 2019 – Dec 2021

- Developed GA4 tracking implementations and event structures
- Used GTM for tag management and deployment
- Built dashboards in Looker Studio for marketing performance tracking
- Worked with BigQuery for data extraction and analysis

### Digital Analyst | Company C
May 2017 – May 2019

- Performed digital marketing analytics and reporting
- Supported GA and GTM implementations
- Created performance reports for marketing campaigns
- Worked with structured datasets in Google Cloud environment

## Skills
- GA4
- GTM
- BigQuery
- Looker Studio
- Google Cloud
- Digital Analytics
- Team Leadership (4 people)</[[TKC1VG2I]]>

<[[TKC1VG2I]]>- Designed and implemented server-side tracking architecture using Google Tag Manager Server-Side
- Set up Meta CAPI and Google Ads server-side conversion tracking for improved attribution accuracy
- Migrated client-side tracking events into server-side event processing pipeline
- Reduced data loss caused by ad blockers and browser restrictions through server-side implementation
- Integrated server-side tracking data into BigQuery for unified reporting in Google Stack</[[TKC1VG2I]]>
